intended_use: Trained medical professionals use Contour ProtégéAI as a tool to assist in the automated processing of digital medical images of modalities CT and MR, as supported by ACR/NEMA DICOM 3.0. In addition,
intended_use_full: Trained medical professionals use Contour ProtégéAI as a tool to assist in the automated processing of digital medical images of modalities CT and MR, as supported by ACR/NEMA DICOM 3.0. In addition, Contour ProtégéAI supports the following indications: Creation of contours using machine-learning algorithms for applications including, but not limited to, quantitative analysis, aiding adaptive therapy, transferring contours to radiation therapy treatment planning systems, and archiving contours for patient follow-up and management. Segmenting normal structures across a variety of CT anatomical locations. And segmenting normal structures of the prostate, seminal vesicles, and urethra within T2-weighted MR images.
ground_truth: MIM Maestro atlas segmentation reference device (leave-one-out analysis with atlases created from same institution test subjects)
other_metrics: Dice coefficient (mean and standard deviation); lower 95th percentile confidence bound reported; equivalence threshold defined as lower 95th percentile confidence bound of Contour ProtégéAI segmentation greater than 0.1 Dice lower than mean MIM Maestro atlas segmentation reference device performance
